simplified_thesis: The Gradient Ladder of Escalation makes the case impossible to dismiss at any rung; a regulator entering at procedural irregularity is carried inevitably to organised criminal enterprise.

step_9.name: Mirror of the Self Test
step_9.result: PASS. Each of the seven rungs is independently provable. The architecture obeys the principle of sufficient escalation: defeat at any rung does not collapse the others, and victory at any rung carries upward momentum to the next.
